features.name: Deflect Missiles
features.description: You can use your reaction to halve the damage you take from an attack that hits you. If you do so, you catch a small missile and can spend 1 ki point to make a ranged weapon attack with it as a bonus action.

features.name: Three Features
features.description: You can start training in three features of your choice from the Monk class feature list: Patient Defense, Step of the Wind, and Flurry of Blows. You gain these features at 4th, 8th, and 16th level, respectively.

features.name: Ki Points Increase
features.description: You can increase your Wisdom score by 2, up to a maximum of 20.
Use a reaction when you fall to reduce falling damage by an amount equal to five times your monk level.
